Read Research Get an Audit
Free Tools

See your numbers.
Find the leaks.

Seven calculators and audits built specifically for HVAC, roofing, and plumbing companies. Start with the fastest leak, then keep going until you know which gap is costing the most. Most owners find $50K-$200K in recoverable leaks on the first pass.

Results show instantly - email required only for the full detailed report
All 7 Tools

Start here: Phone Revenue shows you the fastest leak. Estimate Follow-Up shows you the second one. Agency Report Card tells you whether your marketing setup is built to find either.

📞
Free Tool 01 of 07
Phone Revenue Calculator
Missed Calls = Lost Jobs

Most owners think they answer 90% of calls. The actual average is 68%. Every unanswered call is a job that went to a competitor. Find out the dollar amount walking out your door every month.

Monthly revenue lostRecovery projectionAnswer rate benchmark
See your lost revenue
📨
Free Tool 02 of 07
Estimate Follow-Up Calculator
68% of Estimates Never Get a Follow-Up

Most owners blame the homeowner for not calling back. The data says otherwise. Enter your estimate volume and see exactly how much revenue is dying in your outbox every year.

Annual lost revenueFollow-up benchmark50% and 80% what-if lift
See the follow-up gap
📋
Free Tool 03 of 07
Agency Report Card
Is Your Agency Measuring the Right Numbers?

Every agency reports impressions, clicks, and cost per lead. Almost none report the number that actually matters: cost per booked job. Answer 10 questions and get a straight grade.

Agency accountability grade10 yes or no checksNo-answer consequence lines
Grade your agency
🛠️
Free Tool 04 of 07
Revenue Per Technician Benchmarker
How Much Revenue Is Each Tech Producing?

Most owners track total revenue. Very few track revenue per tech, the number that tells you whether your team is running at capacity or leaving jobs on the table. Enter your numbers and see exactly where you stand.

Revenue per techTrade benchmarksWhole-team gap
Benchmark your team
📊
Free Tool 05 of 07
Marketing Cost Calculator
What Does a Booked Job Actually Cost You?

Most companies track leads. Very few know what it costs to book a real job. Enter your numbers and see your true cost per booked job, benchmarked against the top 25% in your trade.

Cost per booked jobChannel benchmark lineROI by channel
Calculate your numbers
📍
Free Tool 06 of 07
GBP Scorecard
How Strong Is Your Google Business Profile?

The map pack is the best free lead source in home services. Most companies are giving ground to competitors on basic GBP factors they do not even know about. Score yourself on the same rubric we use for competitor teardowns.

35-point scorecardSection breakdownMap pack benchmark context
Score your GBP
🔍
Free Tool 07 of 07
Website Conversion Audit
Would a homeowner actually call after visiting your site?

Most contractor websites look fine, but fail in 3 critical places: speed, mobile experience, and call friction. Answer 12 quick questions about your site and get a Conversion Leak Score with specific fixes.

Conversion leak scoreIssue listWebsite fix priorities
Audit your website
Want the full picture?

See everything in one audit.

The free tools show individual leaks. The Revenue Leak Audit covers everything - your full marketing system, competitor benchmarks, phone performance, and website - with every finding shown in annual dollars.

Get a Revenue Leak Audit ($750)
Built on Tenth

Revenue intelligence for home service companies. We study how the most profitable HVAC, roofing, and plumbing businesses grow. We share everything we find.
